project_type: C++17 single-binary AI system with knowledge graph, LLM integration, homelab tools, and Telegram bot
build_system: make with clang++. Single compilation unit pattern: system/mk_entry.cpp #includes ALL .cpp modules. No separate .o linking.
test_framework: Custom test framework in tests/test_main.cpp with TEST_ASSERT macros. tests/test_integration.cpp has integration tests. Test compilation also uses single-unit include pattern.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'make' from MK_OS/ to confirm build succeeds. 2. Run 'make test' from MK_OS/ to confirm all tests pass (currently 59 tests, 443 assertions). 3. Run 'make full-test' for build + test + python check + shell syntax.
setup_instructions: System has clang++, libcurl, libsqlite3 pre-installed. Just run 'make' from MK_OS/ directory.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. Build runs on host directly (no Docker needed). macOS target with -DDARWIN flag. No local LLM server running.
contribution_requirements: No formal contributing guide. Build must succeed with no errors (warnings OK). All tests must pass.
key_patterns: 1. All .cpp files use #ifndef guards and are included via mk_entry.cpp (no separate compilation). 2. Classes are self-contained in single .cpp files. 3. LLM interaction uses OpenAI-compatible chat/completions format. 4. tool execution via popen/system calls. 5. JSON parsing is done manually (no external JSON library). 6. Provider routing has urgency-based scoring. 7. MK_SYSTEM_PROMPT is the single source of truth for LLM personality. 8. sanitizeLLMResponse strips prompt leakage.
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the project root. system/ has entry point and daemon. llm/ has LLM provider code. ai_core/ has legacy engines (to remove). ai_core/hre/ has knowledge graph (pattern_graph to KEEP). mk_brain/ has memory, learning, embeddings, personality. homelab/ has SSH/Docker/monitoring tools. tools/ has file reader, code runner. crypto/ has trading bot. mind/ has goal/strategy engine. network/ has web APIs. config/ has JSON config. tests/ has test suite.
